_README: Schema template for the Atif TY 2025 ground-truth eval set used by
by code (15 meals, 15 travel, 15 supplies, 10 contractor, 10 vehicle,
10 home-office, 10 client/income, 10 transfer, 5 personal). Save as
.gitignore'd because the contents reflect Atif's actual ledger, not
fixtures appropriate for the public repo.
Each key is a Transaction.id from production. Each value is the
CPA-graded gold standard. Run scripts/eval-atif.mjs to compare live

<transaction-id-1>.rationale: Restaurant in trip window — 50% deductible per §274(n)(1)

<transaction-id-2>.rationale: Coffee shop on a weekend, no business pattern — personal

<transaction-id-3>.rationale: Adobe Creative Cloud subscription — ordinary §162 business expense

<transaction-id-5>.rationale: Wise outflow paired with checking inflow — internal transfer
